memberdef.name: AccF32Type
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "accumulator.AccF32", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(AccF32Object), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)AccF32_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "AccF32 type.", .tp_methods = AccF32_methods, .tp_new = AccF32_new, .tp_init = (initproc)AccF32_init, }
